name: PHN Technology Pvt. Ltd.
tagline: India's Most Trusted Destination For AI & Robotics Education
full_address: Tower A, Giga Platinum, Somnath Nagar Rd, near Akoya Skoda Showroom, Clover Park, Viman Nagar, Pune, Maharashtra 411014
description: PHN Technology is revolutionizing education by delivering comprehensive, industry-driven learning solutions. Founded to bridge the gap between traditional education and industry requirements, PHN Technology ensures students gain practical, job-ready skills. With 12+ years of expertise, they have collaborated with 2500+ institutions across India, providing customized education solutions that integrate STEM learning, robotics, AI, IoT, and industry-relevant technologies into academic frameworks. Their programs foster creativity, problem-solving, and real-world application, helping students transition seamlessly into tech-driven careers.
mission: To make technical education practical and accessible, empowering student innovation and leadership across India and beyond, fostering a generation of globally competitive technologists and entrepreneurs.
vision: To nurture future leaders and innovators by providing hands-on, entrepreneurial technical education and empowering India's youth, with expanding global impact.

services.name: School Solution
services.description: Passion-driven, hands-on STEM education for school students (Class 6–12). Includes IIT lab visits, coding, robotics, AI, and entrance exam preparation.

services.name: College Solution
services.description: Industry readiness program for college students including live projects, workshops, certifications, and placement connect. Bridging the gap between degree and industry.

services.name: Robotics Development
services.description: Industrial automation, AI-powered robotics, and smart manufacturing solutions for institutions and industries.

services.name: IT Development
services.description: SaaS, cloud computing, and customized software solutions to help businesses stay ahead with technology.

types: Hands-On Workshops (Robotics, AI/ML, IoT, Drone, AR/VR)

key_highlights: Expert curriculum designed and reviewed by India's top faculty (IIT/NIT directors and professors)
Hands-on focus with practical labs and real project milestones
Verified certification co-branded with IIT/NIT/IIIT partner institutes
India's most equipped Technology CoE Lab in Pune
100% immersive live and hands-on learning experience
advisory_board_highlights: Prof. K.K. Pant – Director, IIT Roorkee
Dr. Laxmidhar Behera – Director, IIT Mandi
Prof. Dharmendra Singh – Director, IIIT Vadodara
Dr. Shirish Ravan – Former Head, UN-SPIDER Beijing Office & ISRO veteran
Dr. A.G. Nagarkar – Ex-DRDO Scientist, Retired Joint Director, Ministry of Defence
Mr. B.S. Gugale – Rtd. Senior Scientist, DRDO

milestones.event: PHN Technology founded with a mission to redefine technical education
Expanded workshops and training programs across Maharashtra
Incorporated as PHN Technology Pvt. Ltd.
Launched Centers of Excellence & Foundation Labs with AI, IoT, and Robotics
Strengthened partnerships with IITs, NITs, and defence PSUs
Established global collaborations and strategic international alliances

legal.refund_summary: All fees are non-refundable and non-transferable. No cancellations accepted after payment. Exceptions only for duplicate payments or verified payment errors — submit request to info@phntechnology.com within 48 hours.
